notes:
v1.3.0 Update
✨ New Features:
• Roll Check: Require a dice roll before puzzles. Success makes it easier, failure makes it harder. D&D 5e / PF2e direct roll support + chat-based triggers for other systems.
• Rune Matching Mode: Memory card game with stone-carved Elder Futhark runes. 4–12 pairs, customizable cards, optional memorization phase, max attempts, and spectator support.
• Monk's Active Tile Triggers: "Trigger Puzzle" action with async completion. Supports success/failure anchor branching in MATT workflows.
• Item Piles: Lock containers behind puzzles. Configure via Token HUD, auto-opens loot UI after solving.
• Tile Highlight Toggle: Hide the yellow hover border per tile while keeping click interaction.

🐛 Bug Fixes:
• Tile puzzles not closing on failure.
• Spectator windows not opening for puzzle modes.

announcement.title: 🎁 Unboxing the Mystery v1.3.0
announcement.content:
v1.3.0 — Roll Checks, Rune Matching & Module Compatibility

  • 🎲 Roll Check: Dice rolls before puzzles. Pass = easier, fail = harder. D&D 5e, PF2e, and generic system support.
  • 🃏 Rune Matching: Memory card game with stone-carved runes. Customizable grid, cards, sounds, and max attempts.
  • 🔗 Monk's Active Tiles: Trigger Puzzle action with async flow control and success/failure anchor branching.
  • 🔗 Item Piles: Puzzle-lock containers and loot piles.
  • 👁️ Tile Highlight Toggle: Hide hover border per tile.
